checkpoints.correctness_role: does not split prompts, choose SQL/API paths, rewrite SQL/API, or generate answers
checkpoints.effect: optimizes resource order, exact duplicate work, cache reuse, and budgets without changing LLM semantics
checkpoints.efficiency_role: prioritizes critical path and enables exact pass-result reuse

checkpoints.correctness_role: keeps backend responsibility limited to scheduling, gates, execution, and result storage
checkpoints.effect: moves LLM-declared passes through fixed execution stages without changing pass semantics
checkpoints.efficiency_role: allows later passes to enter free stages before earlier passes finish all stages
checkpoints.technique: resource-bounded stage scheduler for LLM-declared pass DAG

checkpoints.correctness_role: separates LLM ownership from compile/request/runtime safety checks
checkpoints.effect: records that backend did not replace LLM semantic or SQL/API generation
checkpoints.efficiency_role: bounds repair attempts before execution
checkpoints.technique: LLM-owned candidate generation with backend-only gates

checkpoints.correctness_role: records runtime evidence or compile/request failures without fabricating data
checkpoints.effect: executes only LLM-proposed candidates that pass backend gates
checkpoints.efficiency_role: does not execute alternative backend-generated candidates

checkpoints.correctness_role: prevents pure direct answer routing from masking evidence-required prompts
checkpoints.effect: records that data/mixed/ambiguous prompts continued into evidence-backed answer grounding
checkpoints.efficiency_role: makes EvidenceBus construction explicit

checkpoints.correctness_role: keeps exact values and scoped caveats in existing EvidenceBus semantics
checkpoints.effect: forwards executed SQL/API evidence into the existing grounded answer pipeline
checkpoints.efficiency_role: uses collected evidence without extra tool calls

checkpoints.correctness_role: keeps pass-level runtime evidence separate from backend answer generation
checkpoints.effect: stores all LLM-declared pass results before final LLM aggregation
checkpoints.efficiency_role: reuses executed pass results without extra tools

checkpoints.correctness_role: prevents API_ERROR as no-data and LIVE_EMPTY as global absence
checkpoints.effect: keeps SQL errors, API errors, live empty, and direct evidence distinct
checkpoints.efficiency_role: uses existing payloads only

checkpoints.correctness_role: provides runtime facts to the LLM-owned final answer composer
checkpoints.effect: turns runtime evidence into typed answer fields
checkpoints.efficiency_role: uses existing slot extraction

checkpoints.correctness_role: diagnostic only; does not alter final answer composition or grounding
checkpoints.effect: records the exact boundary before the potentially slow final-answer LLM call
checkpoints.efficiency_role: enables smoke timeout localization without extra SQL/API calls

checkpoints.correctness_role: backend does not render deterministic templates or select competing answers
checkpoints.effect: lets the LLM own final answer composition from runtime evidence
checkpoints.efficiency_role: uses one final-answer LLM call after evidence execution
